---
name: Security vulnerability (redirect)
about: Please do NOT file public issues for security bugs. Use the link inside instead.
title: "DO NOT USE — report privately via GitHub Security Advisories"
labels: ["security"]
---

**STOP.** Do not file public issues for security vulnerabilities.

Report privately via [GitHub Security Advisories](https://github.com/hammadkhan/hacker-news-client/security/advisories/new), which opens a confidential advisory visible only to you and the maintainers.

See [`SECURITY.md`](https://github.com/hammadkhan/hacker-news-client/blob/main/SECURITY.md) for the full disclosure policy.

If you've already filed this as a public issue, please close it and re-file privately. We will coordinate disclosure from there.
